name: News Scraper
description: Scrape news from web sources on schedule, summarize with LLM, and deliver to your channels.

openrouterApiKey.description: OpenRouter API key for free/cheap LLM summarization.

scraplingUrl.description: Optional Scrapling MCP HTTP server URL for stealth scraping (e.g. http://localhost:8000).

maxItemsPerFeed.description: Max items to process per feed per check (default: 100).

playwrightTimeout.description: Playwright page load timeout in ms (default: 30000).
